title: Ramp in talks to hit $40B+ valuation, 6 months after reaching $32B
summary: Ramp is in discussions to raise $750 million at a pre-money valuation exceeding $40 billion, just six months after its last funding round at $32 billion. This demonstrates significant investor confidence in the fintech company's growth trajectory. The rapid valuation increase reflects strong market demand for corporate financial management solutions.
content: The company is reportedly in talks to raise another $750 million at a pre-money valuation of more than $40 billion. It last raised in November at $32 billion.

zh.title: Ramp目标达成40B+估值，距离上一轮32B融资仅6个月
zh.summary: Ramp正在进行融资讨论，以超过400亿美元的融前估值筹集7.5亿美元，距离其上一轮32亿美元融资仅6个月。这表明投资者对这家金融科技公司的增长轨迹充满信心。估值的迅速上升反映了企业财务管理解决方案的强劲市场需求。

title: OpenAI launches new voice intelligence features in its API
summary: OpenAI has released new voice intelligence capabilities in its API with applications spanning customer service, education, and creator platforms. These features enable broader accessibility to voice-based AI interactions across industries. The expansion demonstrates OpenAI's effort to diversify AI applications beyond text-based interfaces.
content: The new features could be handy for customer service systems, but OpenAI says they have applications that work across a variety of other fields, including education and creator platforms.

zh.title: OpenAI在其API中推出新的语音智能功能
zh.summary: OpenAI已在其API中发布了新的语音智能功能，应用涵盖客户服务、教育和创作者平台。这些功能使语音AI交互在各行业更加易用。该扩展展示了OpenAI致力于将AI应用扩展到文本界面之外的努力。

title: Kodiak AI raises $100M at a steep discount, sending its stock tumbling 37%
summary: Kodiak AI completed a $100 million funding round at a significantly reduced valuation, triggering a 37% stock decline. The company also announced a new commercial contract, a Canadian pilot program, and a strategic collaboration. The steep discount reflects investor concerns about the autonomous driving sector's near-term profitability.
content: The company made a series of other announcements during earnings, including a new commercial contract, a pilot program in Canada, and a collaboration.

zh.title: Kodiak AI以大幅折扣融资1亿美元，股价跌幅37%
zh.summary: Kodiak AI以大幅降低的估值完成了1亿美元融资，导致股价下跌37%。公司还宣布了新的商业合同、加拿大试点项目和战略合作。这种大幅折扣反映了投资者对自动驾驶行业短期盈利能力的担忧。

title: Disney looking to make a unified ‘super app,’ report says
summary: Disney CEO Josh D'Amaro is pursuing a unified "super app" to consolidate the company's fragmented digital experiences. This strategy aligns with his stated goal to streamline the customer experience across Disney's various services. The initiative could improve user engagement and monetization across Disney's entertainment platforms.
content: Disney CEO Josh D'Amaro, who took over for Bob Iger earlier this year, has emphasized his intent to streamline the Disney experience.

zh.title: 迪士尼计划推出统一的"超级应用"，报道称
zh.summary: 迪士尼首席执行官乔什·达马罗正在推动开发一个统一的"超级应用"，以整合公司零散的数字体验。这一战略与他简化迪士尼各项服务用户体验的既定目标相符。该举措可能会提高用户在迪士尼娱乐平台上的参与度和变现效果。

title: DHS can’t create vast DNA database to track ICE critics, lawsuit says
summary: A lawsuit alleges the Department of Homeland Security attempted to use ICE surveillance to create a massive DNA database. The legal action challenges the agency's purported efforts to expand surveillance capabilities against critics. This case raises significant privacy and constitutional concerns about government data collection practices.
content: Lawsuit accuses DHS of plugging DNA database into ICE surveillance machine.

zh.title: 诉讼称国土安全部不能建立庞大DNA数据库追踪移民及海关执法批评者
zh.summary: 一起诉讼指控国土安全部试图利用移民及海关执法监视来建立一个大规模DNA数据库。该法律诉讼质疑该机构扩展针对批评者的监视能力的行为。此案引发了关于政府数据收集实践的重大隐私和宪法问题。

title: Canvas is down as ShinyHunters threatens to leak schools’ data
summary: The Instructure-owned Canvas learning management platform went offline following confirmation of a major data breach that exposed student names, email addresses, ID numbers, and messages. The hacking group ShinyHunters claimed responsibility and threatened to release the compromised data unless schools hire cyber advisors. The incident affects thousands of educational institutions relying on Canvas.
content:
The Instructure-owned learning management platform, Canvas, is down after recently confirming a massive data breach that impacted student names, email addresses, ID numbers, and messages. Students attempting to access the system on Thursday saw a message from the hacking group ShinyHunters, which claimed responsibility for the attack:
ShinyHunters has breached Instructure (again). Instead of contacting us to resolve it they ignored us and did some "security patches." If any of the schools in the affected list are interested in preventing the release of their data, please consult with a cyber advisory firm and contact us privately at TOX to …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Canvas平台宕机，ShinyHunters威胁泄露学校数据
zh.summary: Instructure旗下的Canvas学习管理平台在确认发生重大数据泄露后离线，该泄露暴露了学生姓名、电子邮件地址、身份证号和消息。黑客组织ShinyHunters宣称对此负责，并威胁除非学校聘请网络顾问否则将发布受损数据。该事件影响了依赖Canvas的数千个教育机构。

title: Voi founders’ new AI startup Pit has become the latest rising star out of Stockholm
summary: Pit, an AI startup founded by former Voi co-founders and backed by Andreessen Horowitz, has raised $16 million in its seed round. The Stockholm-based company represents continued innovation from the team behind the successful European scooter platform. The a16z backing signals investor confidence in the founders' ability to build transformative AI products.
content: AI startup Pit is led by the co-founders of European scooter giant Voi and backed by a16z, which is leading the startup’s $16 million seed round.

zh.title: Voi创始人新AI创业公司Pit成为斯德哥尔摩的最新明星
zh.summary: 由前Voi联合创始人创立并获得安德森·霍洛维茨基金支持的AI创业公司Pit已在种子轮融资中筹集1600万美元。这家位于斯德哥尔摩的公司代表了曾经成功推出欧洲滑板车平台的团队的持续创新。a16z的支持表明投资者对创始人构建变革性AI产品的能力充满信心。

title: Hackers deface school login pages after claiming another Instructure hack
summary: The cybercrime group ShinyHunters claimed responsibility for another Instructure hack and defaced login pages at multiple customer schools with extortion messages. The attack compounds Instructure's security challenges and directly impacts educational operations. The defacement represents an escalation in the hackers' campaign to pressure institutions into paying for data protection.
content: The cybercrime group ShinyHunters claimed to have hacked Instructure again, defacing the login pages of several Instructure customer schools with an extortion message.

zh.title: 黑客在声称进行另一次Instructure黑客攻击后篡改学校登录页面
zh.summary: 网络犯罪团伙ShinyHunters声称对另一次Instructure黑客攻击负责，并在多个客户学校的登录页面上篡改信息，留下勒索信息。这次攻击加剧了Instructure的安全问题，直接影响教育运营。这次篡改代表了黑客活动的升级，目的是施压机构支付数据保护费用。

title: Gusto hits $1B revenue, a figure that brings it closer to public markets
summary: Gusto, the HR and payroll platform, has reached $1 billion in actual revenue, a significant milestone on its path to going public. Unlike ARR estimates, this figure represents confirmed annual recurring revenue. The achievement demonstrates the company's strong market position and financial maturity.
content: Gusto has shared an impressive milestone on its actual revenue, not an ARR number that estimates future income.

zh.title: Gusto达到10亿美元收入，这一数字使其更接近公开市场
zh.summary: 人力资源和薪酬平台Gusto已达到10亿美元的实际收入，这是其走向上市道路上的一个重要里程碑。与ARR估算不同，这个数字代表的是确认的年度经常性收入。这一成就证明了公司强大的市场地位和财务成熟度。

title: OpenAI introduces new ‘Trusted Contact’ safeguard for cases of possible self-harm
summary: OpenAI has launched a "Trusted Contact" safeguard feature to protect ChatGPT users when conversations may involve self-harm. The feature expands OpenAI's commitment to user safety and mental health support. This initiative reflects growing responsibility in AI companies to address potential harms from their products.
content: The company is expanding its efforts to protect ChatGPT users in cases where conversations may turn to self-harm.

zh.title: OpenAI推出新的"受信联系人"保护功能，用于应对可能的自伤情况
zh.summary: OpenAI推出了"受信联系人"保护功能，在对话可能涉及自伤时保护ChatGPT用户。该功能进一步体现了OpenAI对用户安全和心理健康支持的承诺。这一举措反映了AI公司在应对其产品潜在危害方面日益增强的责任意识。

title: Tesla Model Y is first car to meet new US driver assistance safety benchmark
summary: The 2026 Tesla Model Y assembled on or after November 12, 2025, is the first vehicle to meet the new US driver assistance safety benchmark. This achievement highlights Tesla's lead in autonomous driving safety standards. The benchmark establishes new performance criteria for the industry's safety expectations.
content: The new benchmark rating applies to 2026 Tesla Model Y vehicles assembled on or after November 12, 2025.

zh.title: Tesla Model Y成为首款满足美国新型驾驶辅助安全基准的车型
zh.summary: 2026年特斯拉Model Y（2025年11月12日及之后组装）是首款满足美国新驾驶辅助安全基准的车型。这一成就突显了特斯拉在自动驾驶安全标准方面的领先地位。该基准为行业安全预期确立了新的性能标准。

title: Perplexity’s Personal Computer is now available to everyone on Mac
summary: Perplexity has launched its Personal Computer AI agent application to all Mac users, bringing autonomous AI capabilities to personal computing. The expansion from beta to general availability represents a significant step in mainstream adoption of AI agents. This move positions Perplexity as a competitor in the emerging personal AI agent market.
content: Perplexity's Personal Computer brings AI agents to your Mac, and is now open to everyone.

zh.title: Perplexity的Personal Computer现已面向Mac用户全面推出
zh.summary: Perplexity已向所有Mac用户推出其Personal Computer AI代理应用，为个人计算带来自主AI能力。从测试版扩展到正式推出代表了AI代理主流采用的重要里程碑。这一举措将Perplexity定位为新兴个人AI代理市场的竞争者。

title: Mira Murati’s deposition pulled back the curtain on Sam Altman’s ouster
summary: Court filings from Musk v. Altman reveal details of Sam Altman's November 2023 ouster from OpenAI, citing new testimony from former CTO Mira Murati. The deposition provides the first public look at the internal dynamics surrounding the dramatic boardroom power struggle. The case sheds light on governance tensions and communication breakdowns at the AI company.
content:
The week leading up to Thanksgiving 2023 was the AI industry's biggest soap opera moment. OpenAI CEO Sam Altman was abruptly ousted from his role at the ChatGPT maker. The explanation? That Altman was "not consistently candid in his communications with the board." Now, via witness testimony and trial exhibits in Musk v. Altman, the public is getting a concrete look behind the scenes of that dramatic weekend for the first time, much of it centered on former CTO Mira Murati.
It was a unique situation in that the roller coaster of a power play - which seemed to change every hour - took place, in many ways, publicly. The board's strikingly vagu …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Mira Murati的证词揭露了Sam Altman被逐出OpenAI的内幕
zh.summary: Musk诉Altman案的法庭文件揭露了Sam Altman在2023年11月被逐出OpenAI的细节，引用了前CTO Mira Murati的新证词。证词首次公开披露了围绕这场戏剧性董事会权力斗争的内部动态。该案件揭示了这家AI公司的治理紧张局势和沟通失效问题。

title: Apple’s AirPods with cameras for AI are apparently close to production
summary: Apple's AirPods Pro 3 with integrated cameras are entering the design validation test stage, approaching mass production, according to Bloomberg reporting. The cameras will capture low-resolution visual information for Siri queries rather than recording photos or video, with applications in task assistance like meal planning. The technology demonstrates Apple's strategy to embed AI capabilities directly into wearable devices.
content:
AirPods Pro 3 | Photo by Amelia Holowaty Krales / The Verge	

Apple's rumored AirPods with cameras are nearing a stage where the company will test early mass production, Bloomberg's Mark Gurman reports. Currently, Apple testers are "actively using" prototypes that are in the design validation test stage, which is one step before the production validation test stage.
The AirPods' cameras "aren't designed" to snap photos or video but instead can take in "visual information in low resolution" that users can query Siri about, like asking the AI assistant what they should cook with the ingredients they have in front of them, according to Gurman. They may also use the cameras to help with things like turn-b …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Apple配备摄像头用于AI的AirPods显然即将投入生产
zh.summary: 据彭博社报道，Apple配备集成摄像头的AirPods Pro 3正进入设计验证测试阶段，接近批量生产。这些摄像头将为Siri查询捕捉低分辨率视觉信息，而不是录制照片或视频，在膳食规划等任务辅助中具有应用前景。该技术展示了Apple将AI功能直接嵌入可穿戴设备的策略。

title: SpaceX has a $55 billion plan to build AI chips in Texas
summary: SpaceX plans to invest at least $55 billion in its "Terafab" chip manufacturing facility in Austin, Texas, with potential expansion to $119 billion. The ambitious facility aims to produce chips supporting 200 gigawatts per year of computing capacity. The project reflects Elon Musk's broader strategy to vertically integrate AI infrastructure beyond spacecraft manufacturing.
content:
Elon Musk's plans to get into the AI chip manufacturing business are going to be costly. As the New York Times and CNBC report, SpaceX is planning to invest at least $55 billion into its "Terafab" chip plant in Austin, Texas. That's according to the details of a public hearing notice filed in Grimes County, Texas, for a meeting to request tax breaks for the project.
The company says that if additional phases are constructed, its investment could someday balloon to $119 billion total. When Musk initially announced the project in March, he shared ambitious plans for it to produce enough chips to support up to 200 gigawatts per year of computi …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: SpaceX计划投入550亿美元在德州建造AI芯片工厂
zh.summary: SpaceX计划在德州奥斯汀投资至少550亿美元建造其"Terafab"芯片制造工厂，有扩展至1190亿美元的潜力。这家雄心勃勃的工厂旨在生产支持每年200吉瓦计算能力的芯片。该项目反映了埃隆·马斯克在太空飞行器制造之外垂直整合AI基础设施的更广泛战略。

title: Elon Musk’s lawsuit is putting OpenAI’s safety record under the microscope
summary: Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI challenges the company's alignment with its founding mission to ensure humanity benefits from artificial general intelligence. The case hinges on whether OpenAI's for-profit operations enhance or undermine its safety-focused mission.
content: Elon Musk's legal effort to dismantle OpenAI may hinge on how its for-profit subsidiary enhances or detracts from the frontier lab's founding mission of ensuring that humanity benefits from artificial general intelligence.

zh.title: 埃隆·马斯克的诉讼将OpenAI的安全记录置于显微镜下
zh.summary: 埃隆·马斯克对OpenAI的诉讼挑战了该公司与其创立使命的一致性,即确保人类从通用人工智能中受益。该案例的关键在于OpenAI的营利性运营是否增强或削弱了其专注于安全的使命。

title: Mozilla says 271 vulnerabilities found by Mythos have "almost no false positives"
summary: Mozilla reports that its AI-assisted bug discovery tool Mythos identified 271 vulnerabilities in Firefox with minimal false positives. The company has fully committed to integrating AI into its security testing processes.
content: The developer of Firefox says it has "completely bought in" on AI-assisted bug discovery.

zh.title: Mozilla称Mythos发现的271个漏洞"几乎没有误报"
zh.summary: Mozilla报告其人工智能辅助漏洞发现工具Mythos在Firefox中识别了271个漏洞,误报率极低。该公司已全力承诺将人工智能整合到其安全测试流程中。

title: Bumble is getting rid of the swipe, CEO says
summary: Dating app Bumble is eliminating its signature swipe feature as it shifts toward AI-powered experiences, including an AI dating assistant called Bee. CEO Whitney Wolfe Herd has positioned AI as a transformative force for modern dating.
content: Based on Whitney Wolfe Herd's past comments about Bumble's new direction, the company is expected to lean into AI -- Bumble is even working on an AI dating assistant called Bee, and the CEO has made many comments over the years about how AI will be "a supercharger to love and relationships."

zh.title: Bumble CEO称将取消滑动功能
zh.summary: 约会应用Bumble正在消除其标志性的滑动功能，转向人工智能驱动的体验，包括一个名为Bee的AI约会助手。CEO Whitney Wolfe Herd将AI定位为现代约会的变革力量。

title: Peak Design is taking up to 50 percent off some of our favorite camera bags
summary: Peak Design is offering up to 50% off select camera bags and accessories through May 8 to celebrate founder Peter Dering's birthday. The sale covers popular backpacks and organizers known for durability and lifetime warranties.
content:
Peak Design’s Everyday Backpack Zip features a unique wraparound zipper that provides quick access to your belongings. | Image: Peak Design	

To celebrate founder Peter Dering’s birthday, Peak Design is taking up to 50 percent off a host of bags and accessories through May 8. The sale includes steep discounts on many of the company’s most popular backpacks and bags, as well as a couple of other items, including camera accessories.
Many Verge staffers are fans of Peak Design, in part because the company is known for making durable, weatherproof products that can house a range of gadgets. Most of its bags are built to carry a lot of gear without feeling bulky or disorganized, thanks to thoughtful extras like expandable storage, quick-access openings, and customizable dividers, which make them great for daily commutes and summer travel alike. Plus, most Peak Design gear is backed by a lifetime warranty, so if something breaks or stops working during normal use, the company will repair or replace it.
Below, we’ve highlighted some of our favorite deals from Peak Design’s ongoing sale, including backpacks, carry-on roller bags, camera organizers, and more.
Peak Design Everyday Backpack Zip
The Peak Design Everyday Backpack Zip features an all-around zipper that makes it easy to quickly access your items from the top or sides. Its weatherproof canvas shell protects valuables, while flexible internal dividers help keep cameras and other tech organized rather than piling at the bottom. It also features dedicated sleeves for a 14-inch laptop or tablet, expandable pockets for water bottles and carry straps, slip pockets for smaller items, and a built-in key tether. 

Where to Buy:

 $199.95 $159.99 at Best Buy (15-liter)
 $199.95 $139.96 at Peak Design (15-liter)
 $229.95 $160.96 at Peak Design (20-liter)

Peak Design Field Pouch V2
The weather-resistant Peak Design Field Pouch V2 works as a small sling or crossbody bag with an adjustable strap, a belt pouch, or an organizer y

zh.title: Peak Design为创始人生日推出相机包50%折扣
zh.summary: Peak Design通过5月8日为庆祝创始人Peter Dering的生日，对精选相机包和配件提供高达50%的折扣。此次销售涵盖以耐用性和终身保修而闻名的热门背包和收纳器。

title: Tome, another Goodreads booktracker rival, shuts down
summary: Tome, a BookTok-focused book tracking app that competed with Goodreads, is shutting down. The closure represents another setback for social reading platforms attempting to compete in a market dominated by Goodreads, underscoring the challenges of niche app adoption.
content: The app was one of several catering to the BookTok crowd.

zh.title: 又一个Goodreads竞争对手Tome关闭
zh.summary: Tome是一款专注于BookTok的书籍追踪应用，与Goodreads竞争，现已关闭。这次关闭对于试图在Goodreads主导的市场中竞争的社交阅读平台来说是另一次挫折，凸显了利基应用采用的困难。

title: Could Lovable’s automatic 10% pay raise be the cure for toxic cultures?
summary: Lovable, a Stockholm-based AI coding platform, is implementing automatic 10% annual pay raises for employees to reduce workplace toxicity and bypass traditional corporate politics. The unconventional HR strategy aims to improve company culture through guaranteed compensation increases.
content: Stockholm-based vibe coding platform Lovable it is offering employees an automatic 10% raise as a way to sidestep classic corporate politics.

zh.title: Lovable的自动10%加薪能治愈有毒的公司文化吗？
zh.summary: Lovable是一个总部位于斯德哥尔摩的AI编程平台，正在为员工实施自动10%年度加薪，以减少工作场所毒性并绕过传统的公司政治。这种非常规的人力资源战略旨在通过保证的薪酬增长来改善公司文化。

title: Hackers hack victims hacked by other hackers
summary: An unknown hacking group is breaking into systems previously compromised by the cybercriminal organization TeamPCP, then removing their malware and tools. The intrusions reveal competition within the hacking ecosystem and potential opportunities for system defense.
content: An unknown group of hackers is breaking into systems previously breached by the cybercrime group TeamPCP. Once inside, the hackers immediately kick out TeamPCP and remove its hacking tools from the victims’ systems.

zh.title: 黑客入侵被其他黑客入侵的受害者系统
zh.summary: 一个未知的黑客组织正在入侵被网络犯罪组织TeamPCP之前破坏的系统，然后删除他们的恶意软件和工具。这些入侵揭示了黑客生态系统中的竞争以及系统防御的潜在机会。

title: Valve is fighting Steam Controller scalpers with a new reservations system
summary: Valve's new Steam Controller sold out quickly and is appearing on eBay at inflated scalper prices. The company is launching a reservations queue system Friday to prevent scalping and provide fair access to customers who missed the initial sale.
content:
Valve's new Steam Controller sold out quickly when it went on sale on Monday, and the company is going to open a "reservations queue" on Friday at 1PM ET for anyone who missed that initial run.
When the controller initially went on sale, many potential buyers experienced difficulties checking out before the controller went out of stock, and some sellers on eBay posted listings for the controllers that were considerably more expensive than Valve's $99 asking price. "While we were happy to see such a high level of interest, the experience for a lot of you trying to buy it was incredibly frustrating," Valve says. It's making changes to "improv …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Valve用新预约系统对抗Steam控制器黄牛
zh.summary: Valve的新Steam控制器很快售罄，并在eBay上以虚高价格出现。该公司将在周五推出预约排队系统，以防止黄牛倒卖，并为错过首发销售的客户提供公平的购买机会。

title: Kalshi doubles valuation in 5 months, hitting $22B
summary: Prediction market platform Kalshi has doubled its valuation to $22 billion in five months through a $1 billion Series F funding round led by Coatue. The rapid capital raise reflects strong investor confidence in the prediction market sector.
content: Prediction market startup Kalshi has raised a $1 billion Series F round led by Coatue.

zh.title: Kalshi在5个月内价值翻倍，达到220亿美元
zh.summary: 预测市场平台Kalshi在五个月内通过由Coatue领投的10亿美元F轮融资，将其估值翻倍至220亿美元。迅速的融资反映了投资者对预测市场领域的强烈信心。

title: ChatGPT’s ‘Trusted Contact’ will alert loved ones of safety concerns
summary: OpenAI is launching an optional ChatGPT safety feature that notifies designated emergency contacts if the platform detects discussions of self-harm or suicide. The feature aims to provide additional support for users in crisis by facilitating connection with trusted people.
content:
OpenAI is launching an optional safety feature for ChatGPT that allows adult users to assign an emergency contact for mental health and safety concerns. Friends, family members, or caregivers designated as a "Trusted Contact" will be notified if OpenAI detects that a person may have discussed topics like self-harm or suicide with the chatbot.
"Trusted Contact is designed around a simple, expert-validated premise: when someone may be in crisis, connecting with someone they know and trust can make a meaningful difference," OpenAI said in its announcement. "It offers another layer of support alongside the localized helplines already available  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: ChatGPT的"信任联系人"将提醒亲友注意安全问题
zh.summary: OpenAI推出了一项可选的ChatGPT安全功能，当该平台检测到自伤或自杀讨论时，会通知指定的紧急联系人。该功能旨在通过促进用户与信任的人的联系，为处于危机中的用户提供额外支持。

title: Jeff Bezos rep leaves Slate Auto’s board
summary: Jeff Bezos' representative has departed Slate Auto's board, raising questions about Bezos' continued support for the startup. The departure coincides with Bezos shifting focus toward robotics through his new venture, Project Prometheus.
content: Melinda Lewison's departure raises questions about Bezos' support and involvement with the startup at a time when the Amazon founder is now apparently focused on robotics at his new startup, Project Prometheus.

zh.title: 杰夫·贝索斯代表离开Slate Auto董事会
zh.summary: 杰夫·贝索斯的代表已从Slate Auto董事会离职，引发了人们对贝索斯是否继续支持这家初创公司的疑问。这次离职恰好与贝索斯通过他的新项目Project Prometheus转向机器人技术的重点转移相吻合。

title: Live updates from Elon Musk and Sam Altman’s court battle over the future of OpenAI
summary: Elon Musk is suing OpenAI and CEO Sam Altman, alleging the company abandoned its nonprofit mission to benefit humanity in favor of profit. The high-stakes trial could determine OpenAI's corporate structure and seeks up to $150 billion in damages, with major tech executives scheduled to testify.
content:
Sam Altman and Elon Musk are facing off in a high-stakes trial that could alter the future of OpenAI and its most well-known product, ChatGPT. In 2024, Musk filed a lawsuit accusing OpenAI of abandoning its founding mission of developing AI to benefit humanity and shifting focus to boosting profits instead. 
Elon Musk, his financial manager and Neuralink CEO, Jared Birchall, and OpenAI cofounder Greg Brockman have already testified before the jury. Shivon Zilis, a former OpenAI board member who shares four children with Musk, took the stand on Wednesday, and the courtroom also watched former OpenAI CTO Mura Murati’s videotaped deposition.
Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella is scheduled to appear on Monday, May 11th, with OpenAI cofounder and former chief scientist Ilya Sutskever lined up to testify after that.

Musk was a cofounder of OpenAI and claims that Altman and Brockman tricked him into giving the company money, only to turn their backs on their original goal. However, OpenAI says that “This lawsuit has always been a baseless and jealous bid to derail a competitor” in a bid to boost Musk’s own SpaceX / xAI / X companies that have launched Grok as a competitor to ChatGPT.
In his lawsuit, Musk is asking for the removal of Altman and Brockman, and for OpenAI to stop operating as a public benefit corporation. Musk has also demanded that OpenAI’s nonprofit receive up to $150 billion in damages he’s asking for if he wins the case.
People to Know
Plaintiff
Elon Musk — plaintiff, OpenAI cofounder and now CEO of rival xAI
Steven Molo — lead counsel for plaintiff
Jared Birchall — manager of Musk’s family office
Shivon Zilis — former OpenAI board member who shares multiple children with Musk
Defendant
Sam Altman — defendant, CEO of OpenAI 
William Savitt — lead counsel for defendant
Greg Brockman — president of OpenAI as well as a cofounder 
Ilya Sutskever — former chief scientist at OpenAI and a cofounder
Judge
Yvonne Gonzalez Rogers — aka YGR, trial judge
Here’s all the late

zh.title: 关于OpenAI未来的埃隆·马斯克与萨姆·奥特曼法庭战争实时更新
zh.summary: 埃隆·马斯克正在起诉OpenAI和首席执行官萨姆·奥特曼，声称该公司放弃了其非营利性任务以造福人类，转而追求利润。这场高风险的诉讼可能会决定OpenAI的公司结构，并寻求最高1500亿美元的赔偿，多位主要科技高管定于作证。

title: Did Microsoft just tease a new Xbox UI?
summary: Microsoft has showcased a unified Xbox user interface designed to provide consistency across handhelds, consoles, and cloud gaming platforms. The redesign addresses long-standing complaints about fragmentation in the Xbox experience across different devices.
content:
Microsoft showed off a "consistent" Xbox UI across handhelds, consoles, and cloud gaming during its Xbox keynote at the Game Developers Conference in March. At the time it was difficult to see if there was anything new about the UI from the videos and photos captured during the event, but Microsoft has now given us a closer look at it thanks to a new video of the keynote that was published earlier today.
Jason Ronald, VP of next generation at Xbox, showed off the UI while mentioning that players had been noticing "a lot of fragmentation within the experience" across devices, and an overall lack of consistency. "What the team has been doing  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 微软刚刚暗示了新的Xbox用户界面吗？
zh.summary: 微软推出了一个统一的Xbox用户界面，旨在在手持设备、控制台和云游戏平台之间提供一致性。这次重新设计解决了关于Xbox在不同设备上体验碎片化的长期投诉。

title: How Anthropic’s Mythos has rewritten Firefox’s approach to cybersecurity
summary: Mozilla security researchers leveraged Anthropic's Mythos tool to uncover numerous high-severity vulnerabilities in Firefox. The collaboration demonstrates how advanced AI security tools can enhance browser security research and identify critical flaws.
content: Security researchers at Mozilla say Anthropic's Mythos has unearthed a wealth of high-severity bugs in Firefox.

zh.title: Anthropic的Mythos如何重塑了Firefox的网络安全方法
zh.summary: Mozilla安全研究人员利用Anthropic的Mythos工具发现了Firefox中众多严重漏洞。这次合作展示了先进的AI安全工具如何能增强浏览器安全研究并识别关键缺陷。

title: A hacker ran me over with a robot lawn mower
summary: Security researcher Andreas Makris remotely hacked a Yarbo robot lawn mower from thousands of miles away to expose critical security vulnerabilities. The demonstration reveals significant cybersecurity risks in IoT devices and highlights the need for improved smart home equipment security.
content:
A Yarbo lawnmower with a trimmer attachment. | Image: Yarbo	

I'm lying in the dirt. It's coming for me. Then, with a lurch, it's climbing up my chest. If Andreas Makris doesn't stop the 200-pound robot lawn mower in time, it could drag its blades across my body.
Makris certainly can't reach over and hit the emergency stop button - he's nearly 6,000 miles away, having hacked this robot from the other side of the planet, to demonstrate the gaping security holes in Yarbo's robot lawn mowers. And I've made the questionable decision of lying down in the mower's path - to see just how far Makris, the security researcher who discovered those flaws, is able to push the mower.
By the time the mower touches m …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 黑客用机器人割草机碾过了我
zh.summary: 安全研究员Andreas Makris从数千英里之外远程入侵了Yarbo机器人割草机，以暴露关键安全漏洞。该演示揭示了物联网设备中的重大网络安全风险，并强调了改进智能家居设备安全的必要性。

title: Inside the return of Xbox
summary: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma has outlined a four-point action plan to revitalize the Xbox division following two years of organizational turbulence. The plan focuses on hardware, games, and other strategic priorities to address recent market challenges.
content:
Two weeks ago there was a buzz in the air inside Microsoft's studio D building. Hundreds of Xbox employees gathered early on a Thursday morning, packed into the hallways and atrium, to hear from Xbox CEO Asha Sharma. The "return of Xbox" slogan was plastered all over the walls of the building, the same message Sharma first delivered to Xbox employees in February. It was time for Sharma to rally the troops, after two years of turbulence, and hint at the future of Xbox.
During the roughly 40-minute all-hands, sources tell me that Sharma laid out a four-point action plan for Xbox employees, focusing on several areas in turn: hardware, games, p …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Xbox回归内幕
zh.summary: Xbox首席执行官Asha Sharma在经历两年组织动荡后概述了一项四点行动计划以重振Xbox部门。该计划关注硬件、游戏和其他战略优先事项以应对最近的市场挑战。

title: The future of Disney Plus is a confused mess
summary: New Disney+ CEO Josh D'Amaro proposes transforming the streaming service into an immersive digital hub serving as the primary relationship between Disney and audiences. The vision positions Disney+ alongside theme parks as a venue for fans to engage with Disney's characters while spending money.
content:
Newly minted CEO Josh D'Amaro says that he wants to turn Disney Plus into "the immersive, interactive digital centerpiece of the company." It used to be that people went to the movies or theme parks to immerse themselves in Disney's fictional worlds. But now, D'Amaro says that he sees Disney Plus becoming "the primary relationship between Disney and its fans." 
The general idea that D'Amaro put forth during his call with investors this week is that Disney Plus and Disney's parks are both places that people visit to spend money while engaging with the company's characters and worlds. D'Amaro framed the streaming service and the parks as comp …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Disney+ 的未来一片混乱
zh.summary: 新任迪士尼+首席执行官乔什·德·阿马罗建议将流媒体服务转变为一个沉浸式数字枢纽,成为迪士尼与观众之间的主要联系纽带。这一愿景将迪士尼+与主题公园并肩定位,成为粉丝参与迪士尼角色并花费金钱的场所。

title: Google’s $9.99-per-month AI health coach launches May 19
summary: Google is launching a Gemini-powered health coaching subscription for $9.99 per month offering fitness coaching, sleep expertise, and wellness advice. The service represents Google's expansion into personalized health and wellness leveraging its AI capabilities.
content: The Gemini-powered health coach will act as a combination fitness coach, sleep expert, and health and wellness advisor.

zh.title: 谷歌每月9.99美元的AI健康教练将于5月19日推出
zh.summary: 谷歌推出由Gemini驱动的健康教练订阅服务,月费9.99美元,提供健身指导、睡眠专业知识和健康建议。该服务代表谷歌利用其AI能力扩展到个性化健康和健康领域。

title: There’s actually a good deal happening now on the Xbox Series X
summary: Best Buy is offering an Xbox Series X bundle with Forza Horizon 6 and limited edition controller at $659.97, providing value despite the console's elevated price since its 2020 launch. The deal represents one of the better offers available as Xbox Series X prices have increased significantly.
content:
It’s been tough to recommend the Xbox Series X recently, especially at the $649 price it has sold at since last October. But if you’re thinking about getting one, at least consider the Forza Horizon 6-themed console bundle you can get at Best Buy that’s just $10 more than the usual inflated price. 
The set includes the Series X with a 1TB SSD, Forza Horizon 6 on disc, and the wild limited edition wireless controller inspired by the game — a $180 value. Sure, you could just get a Game Pass Ultimate subscription to play Horizon 6 on its May 19th launch day, but then you’d miss out on the free controller.
Xbox Series X bundle (Forza Horizon 6 plus limited edition controller)

Where to Buy:

 $809.97 $659.97 at Best Buy

The best time to have bought an Xbox Series X was when it launched in 2020, or shortly after (people shouldn’t forget that it used to occasionally sell for $350). Consoles have gotten more expensive since then — the Series X and the PlayStation 5 now sell for $150 more than their debut price. However, deals are easier to find on a PS5 than an Xbox. If you’ve been waiting for anything resembling a discount to hit the Series X, perhaps this will suffice. I mean, we’ve got to have something to play Grand Theft Auto 6 on, right?
More deals and discounts
If you’re looking for a fast Qi 2.2 25W MagSafe power bank that can magnetically snap onto the back of your iPhone 16 or 17, there’s a day-long deal happening at Best Buy that might appeal to you. Ugreen’s blue-colored MagFlow 10,000mAh battery is down to $49.99 (originally $79.99). It has great specs at this price. In addition to the fastest wireless charging speeds available, it supports 30W wired charging with its built-in, braided USB-C cable. There’s a spare USB-C port, too, letting you charge a second device, or recharge the battery at 30W speeds. It’s currently $10 more at Amazon.
A four-pack of first-gen Apple AirTags have hit a new low price. At Woot, you can grab the kit for $56.99, which comes out

zh.title: Xbox Series X现在确实有个好优惠
zh.summary: 百思买正在以659.97美元的价格提供Xbox Series X套装,包括Forza Horizon 6和限量版控制器,尽管该主机自2020年发布以来价格上升,但仍提供价值。该优惠代表了现有的更好选择之一,因为Xbox Series X价格大幅上涨。

title: Google unveils screenless Fitbit Air and Google Health app to replace Fitbit
summary: Google unveiled the screenless Fitbit Air, priced at $100 and available for preorder. The device represents Google's strategy to reimagine its health-focused hardware separate from the traditional Fitbit brand.
content: The $100 Fitbit Air is available for preorder today.

title: RIP social media. What comes next is messy.
summary: As users migrate away from centralized social media platforms, new decentralized and niche online communities are emerging. The article explores challenges in preventing these fragmented online spaces from becoming toxic echo chambers.
content: As social media splinters, how can we keep the new online spaces from devolving into toxic pits of despair?

zh.summary: 随着用户从集中式社交媒体平台迁移，新的去中心化和利基在线社区正在出现。该文章探讨了防止这些碎片化在线空间成为有毒回声室的挑战。

title: Elon Musk tried to hire OpenAI founders to start AI unit inside Tesla
summary: Elon Musk reportedly attempted to recruit OpenAI founders to establish an AI unit within Tesla, contingent on his gaining operational control. The effort reflects Musk's ongoing conflict with OpenAI and his ambitions for Tesla's AI capabilities.
content: Musk was “prepared to do the for-profit, provided he would get control.”

title: Spotify’s AI DJ now supports French, German, Italian and Brazilian Portuguese
summary: Spotify has expanded its AI DJ feature to support French, German, Italian, and Brazilian Portuguese. This expansion extends the AI-powered music curation service to additional international markets.
content: Spotify's AI DJ feature now supports French, German, Italian, and Brazilian Portuguese.

content: Nordschleife-specialist Manthey has developed an upgrade package for the Porsche EV.

title: Former NASA chief takes helm of national security space firm
summary: A former NASA chief has assumed leadership of a national security-focused space firm. The company specializes in spacecraft technology, including in-orbit refueling capabilities for extending operational lifespans.
content: "The spacecraft can also be refueled, and it can refuel others."

title: Five architects of the AI economy explain where the wheels are coming off
summary: Industry leaders discuss critical challenges in the AI supply chain, including chip shortages and potential architectural flaws, at the Milken Global Conference.
content: Earlier this week, five people who touch every layer of the AI supply chain sat down at the Milken Global Conference in Beverly Hills, where they talked with TechCrunch about everything from chip shortages to orbital data centers to the possibility that the whole architecture that undergirds the tech is wrong.

zh.title: 五位AI经济架构师解释问题所在
zh.summary: 行业领袖在米尔肯全球会议上讨论AI供应链的关键挑战，包括芯片短缺和潜在的架构缺陷。
